description: Customer Portal Manager — customer-facing portal for trip requests, itineraries, document sharing, flight status, self-service booking for approved customers, and feedback collection

hard_stops.label: Customer PII Exposed
hard_stops.logic: Customer personally identifiable information detected in a channel or output that is not properly secured — data breach risk

hard_stops.label: Booking Without Customer Verification
hard_stops.logic: Charter booking request from an unverified customer — identity verification required before accepting charter commitment

soft_flags.label: Trip Request Incomplete
soft_flags.logic: Customer trip request is missing required information — follow up for completion before quoting

soft_flags.label: Negative Customer Feedback
soft_flags.logic: Customer submitted negative feedback — escalate to operations manager for service recovery

soft_flags.label: Customer Document Expiring
soft_flags.logic: Customer passport, visa, or other travel document is approaching expiration — notify customer

soft_flags.label: Booking Conflict Detected
soft_flags.logic: Customer booking request conflicts with an existing reservation or aircraft availability
